title: Bridge Essay: Religious and spiritual experiences from a neuroscientific and complex systems perspective.
concept: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**Religious and spiritual experiences from a neuroscientific and complex systems perspective.** - Neurosci Biobehav Rev (2025). DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2025.106319. PMID: 40774474. The emergence of spiritual and religious practices can be seen as a major cognitive transition in the evolution of biological organisms. Spiritual and religious experiences are closely linked to evolved complex brain structures, as well as their dynamics and plasticity. In this review, we will focus on the neural mechanisms that make such experiences possible.
